phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the basilica on the hill
phrases.text_local: Comment monter à la basilique Notre-Dame de la Garde à pied ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh-MAN mon-TAY ah lah bah-zee-LEEK not-ruh-DAMD lah GARD ah pyay
phrases.cultural_note: The walk up from the Vieux-Port takes about 20-30 minutes. Alternatively, bus #60 goes directly to the basilica from Place Castellane.

responses.english: On foot, twenty minutes from the Vieux-Port. Or take bus 60.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.french: À pied, vingt minutes depuis le Vieux-Port. Ou prenez le bus 60.

phrases.text_local: L'entrée de la basilique est-elle gratuite ?
phrases.pronunciation: lahn-TRAY duh lah bah-zee-LEEK eh-tel grah-TWEET
phrases.cultural_note: Entry to the basilica is free, as with most churches in France.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the best viewpoint over the city
phrases.text_local: D'où peut-on voir toute la ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TON vwar too lah VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: The terrace offers 360-degree views over Marseille, the port, the Frioul islands, and on clear days, the Calanques cliffs.

responses.english: From the terrace, a 360-degree view of the whole city.
responses.french: Depuis la terrasse, vue à 360 degrés sur toute la ville.

phrases.cultural_note: The basilica has generous opening hours and is open daily year-round.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: layz oh-REHR son ah-fee-SHAY ah lahn-TRAY
responses.french: Les horaires sont affichés à l'entrée.
